[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You’re happy when you’re sleeping.\r
That’s nice.\f
HGSS.754.0852:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You’re happy when you’re eating.\r
That’s nice.\f
HGSS.754.0853:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Your allowance is a worry? Ouch.\f
HGSS.754.0855:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Your fitness is a concern? Ouch.\f
HGSS.754.0857:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You’re studying hard for school?\r
Good for you!\f
HGSS.754.0858:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You’re working hard on your diet?\r
Be good to yourself.\f
HGSS.754.0859:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Ooh, you’re working hard on romance?\r
That must be nice!\f
HGSS.754.0860:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You’re working hard on your training?\r
Good luck with that!\f
HGSS.754.0861:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
So you’re good at all kinds of\r
team sports. Gotcha.\f
HGSS.754.0865:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You want to be a pro athlete.\f
HGSS.754.0866:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You want to be an inventor.\f
HGSS.754.0867:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You want to be a musician.\f
HGSS.754.0868:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
You want to be a comedian.\f
HGSS.754.0869:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
A very convenient place?\r
That must be cool.\f
HGSS.754.0870:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
A place with lots of nature?\r
That must be cool.\f
HGSS.754.0871:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
A very quiet place?\r
It must be nice.\f
HGSS.754.0872:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
A place with rare things and events?\r
That must be cool.\f
HGSS.754.0874:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
I see. You’re in a warm place.\f
HGSS.754.0875:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
I see. You’re in a cold place.\f
HGSS.754.0876:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
I see. You’re in a cool place.\f
HGSS.754.0877:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Oh, so there are other people.\f
HGSS.754.0879:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Oh, so there’s a TV somewhere close.\f
HGSS.754.0880:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Oh, so you don’t hear very much.\f
HGSS.754.0881:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Oh, you smell something cooking?\r
Sounds nice!\f
HGSS.754.0882:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Oh, you smell other people? OK.\f
HGSS.754.0883:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Oh, you smell the season, huh?\r
That’s neat.\f
HGSS.754.0885:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
The latest toys interest you the most?\r
That’s interesting.\f
HGSS.754.0886:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Fashionable clothes interest you the\r
most? That’s interesting.\f
HGSS.754.0887:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
Tomorrow’s weather concerns you the\r
most? OK.\f
HGSS.754.0888:
[FF00,0002][0103,0000,0000][FF00,0000]:
New pop stars are what interest you\r
most? Neat.\f
